name: Nango
description: Open-source OAuth and API integration platform. 300+ pre-built integrations. Handles token refresh, rate limits, and webhooks for any API your agents call.

skills.name: Handle OAuth 2.0 and API key flows for 300+ providers without writing auth code
skills.description: Handle OAuth 2.0 and API key flows for 300+ providers without writing auth code

skills.name: Refresh tokens automatically before expiry so agent calls never fail mid-run

skills.name: Normalize webhooks from any provider into a consistent format for your pipeline

skills.name: Store credentials securely with per-user and per-connection isolation
